assertions.title: Core entity types produce visible highlights

steps.action: Upload detect-core.pdf in Identity only mode
steps.expected: Preview shows highlights for listed core entity types
steps.observed: Preview rendered with category lists for SSN, ITIN, EIN, credit card, phone, email, street address, city/state/ZIP, DOB, bank account, routing number, dollar amounts, passport

evidence.network: No outbound API calls observed; only local dev asset/worker requests

assertions.title: Context labels are NOT highlighted — only values

steps.action: Inspect labeled values (e.g., SSN:, Account Number:)
steps.observed: SSN value and account number value are highlighted while label text remains unhighlighted

evidence.network: No outbound API calls observed; only local dev asset/worker requests

assertions.title: Three color-coded highlight states are visually distinct

steps.action: Inspect highlight styles on detect-core fixture
steps.expected: REDACT red/filled, KEEP green, UNCERTAIN amber/dashed visible together
steps.observed: All three styles visible simultaneously (red=13, green=1, amber/dashed=1)

evidence.network: No outbound API calls observed; only local dev asset/worker requests

assertions.title: Dollar amounts are KEEP in Identity mode and REDACT in Full mode

steps.action: Observe amount highlight in Identity only mode
steps.observed: Dollar amount shown with green KEEP highlight

steps.action: Switch to Full redact mode and re-check same amount
steps.observed: Same amount highlight changed to red; green count dropped from 1 to 0

evidence.network: No outbound API calls observed; only local dev asset/worker requests

assertions.title: Credit card with valid Luhn detected; invalid Luhn ignored

steps.action: Upload detect-luhn.pdf containing valid and invalid card numbers
steps.observed: Two overlays rendered: valid number highlighted as red credit card, invalid number still highlighted as amber uncertain bank-account-like match

evidence.network: No outbound API calls observed; only local dev asset/worker requests

assertions.issues: Invalid Luhn number was still highlighted (as UNCERTAIN), so the valid number was not the only highlighted number.

assertions.title: Multi-word street address spans a contiguous highlight

steps.expected: Address is covered continuously with no gaps
steps.observed: Single contiguous overlay rect covered full address text

evidence.network: No outbound API calls observed; only local dev asset/worker requests

frictions.description: The visible 'browse your files' control is not directly uploadable via agent-browser upload; the hidden file input had to be temporarily exposed in-session to attach fixtures.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to unhide input[type=file] and upload assigned fixture PDFs.
